text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 14 

BED_TYPE_CD 

LABEL: Bed Type Code 

DESCRIPTION: A code to classify types of beds available at a facility. 

SHORT NAME: BED_TYPE_CD 

LONG NAME: BED_TYPE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR bed type 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 1 = Intermediate care facility for individuals with intellectual disabilities 
2 = Inpatient 
3 = Nursing facility
